payload.subject: Fwd: Snap initiates mass layoffs
payload.preview:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: LinkedIn News <editors-noreply@linkedin.com>
Date: Wed, Apr 15, 2026 at 4:01ГўВҖВҜPM
Subject: Snap initiates mass layoffs
To: Justin Mitchel <jmitchel3@gmail.com>


The social media company is also closing
